# Apex Holdings Corporate Profile

Apex Holdings is a multinational conglomerate headquartered in Singapore. It operates across technology, logistics, and advanced manufacturing.

Apex Holdings is the parent company of NovaTech Industries and BrightLink Logistics. Through its subsidiary structure, Apex Holdings owns a controlling stake in both companies.

The current CEO of Apex Holdings is Elena Varga. Elena Varga previously worked at Orion Systems and Meridian Capital before joining Apex Holdings in 2019.

NovaTech Industries produces the QuantumEdge Server product line. BrightLink Logistics supplies logistics services for several manufacturing partners.

# NovaTech Industries

NovaTech Industries is a technology company and a subsidiary of Apex Holdings. NovaTech Industries is headquartered in Austin and focuses on enterprise computing.

The CEO of NovaTech Industries is Marcus Chen. Marcus Chen worked at Orion Systems from 2010 to 2016 and later founded a startup acquired by NovaTech Industries.

NovaTech Industries produces QuantumEdge Server and EdgeLite Workstation. QuantumEdge Server competes with products from Helix Compute.

Helix Compute is considered a competitor of NovaTech Industries in the enterprise server market.

# Supply Chain Notes: QuantumEdge Server

The QuantumEdge Server product depends on several key suppliers.

SiliconForge supplies advanced chips for QuantumEdge Server. Harbor Components supplies power modules for QuantumEdge Server.

Interestingly, SiliconForge also supplies chips for Helix Compute's flagship servers. Harbor Components supplies only NovaTech Industries in the enterprise server segment.

BrightLink Logistics provides shipping services to both NovaTech Industries and Helix Compute distribution centers.

# Executive Biography: Elena Varga

Elena Varga is the CEO of Apex Holdings. Before Apex Holdings, Elena Varga worked at Orion Systems as VP of Strategy and later at Meridian Capital as Managing Director.

During her time at Orion Systems, Elena Varga collaborated with Marcus Chen on cloud product strategy. Marcus Chen later became CEO of NovaTech Industries.

Elena Varga founded no companies of her own but has served on the board of events related to Southeast Asia tech investment summits.

# Helix Compute Overview

Helix Compute is an enterprise hardware company. Helix Compute competes with NovaTech Industries.

Helix Compute produces the HelixCore Server. SiliconForge supplies processors for HelixCore Server as well as for QuantumEdge Server.

The CEO of Helix Compute is Priya Nair. Priya Nair previously worked at Meridian Capital.

# Acquisition Event: Harbor Components

In 2024, NovaTech Industries acquired a minority stake related partnership with Harbor Components, strengthening the QuantumEdge Server supply chain.

The event is recorded as the Harbor Partnership 2024. NovaTech Industries participated in Harbor Partnership 2024. Apex Holdings also participated in Harbor Partnership 2024 through its ownership of NovaTech Industries.

BrightLink Logistics was not an acquirer in this event but continued to supply logistics to NovaTech Industries.
